body:
# FR — Deities Complete Reference (D&D 3.5)

Primary source: Faiths & Pantheons (2002), FRCS (2001), Player's Guide to Faerûn (2004)
Live lookup: https://forgottenrealms.fandom.com/wiki/[Deity_Name]

---

## The Overgod

**Ao** — Overgod of Faerûn. Stands above all other deities. Not worshipped; grants no spells.
Created the original Tablets of Fate. Caused the Time of Troubles (1358 DR) by casting the gods
from the planes when the Tablets were stolen. His nature is inscrutable even to the gods.

---

## Faerûnian Pantheon

### Greater Deities

**Chauntea** (CHAWN-tee-ah)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Agriculture, plants, farmers, gardeners, summer
Domains: Animal, Earth, Good, Plant, Protection, Renewal
Favored Weapon: Scythe | Symbol: Blooming rose on top of a staff of grain
Worshippers: Druids, farmers, gardeners, rural folk, ranchers
Clergy: Druids and clerics; focus on cultivation and abundance. Temples in farming communities.
Notes: Sister / rival of Talona. Ancient deity; predates most of the Faerûnian pantheon.

**Cyric** (SEER-ick)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Murder, lies, deception, illusion, intrigue, strife
Domains: Chaos, Destruction, Evil, Illusion, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Sword (longsword — "Godsbane") | Symbol: White jawless skull on black/purple
Worshippers: Murderers, the power-hungry, nihilists, those who revel in strife
Clergy: Secretive, often infiltrating other organizations. Constant internal power struggles.
Notes: Mortal thief who ascended at the end of the Time of Troubles. Killed Bhaal, Bane, and Myrkul
(briefly). Unstable and paranoid. His holy book, the Cyrinishad, drives readers insane.

**Kelemvor** (KEHL-em-vor)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Death, the dead, the afterlife
Domains: Fate, Law, Protection, Travel
Favored Weapon: Bastard sword | Symbol: Upright skeletal arm holding balanced scales
Worshippers: The dying, those who tend to the dead, judges, mortals fearful of undeath
Clergy: Practical, unsentimental. Destroy undead; ease passage of the dying. Gray-robed.
Notes: Former mortal (Kelemvor Lyonsbane) who ascended after the ToT. Replaced Jergal/Myrkul.
Just and fair; despises undeath as an affront to the natural order. Lover of Midnight (Mystra).

**Mystra** (MISS-trah)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Magic, spells, the Weave, creativity
Domains: Good, Illusion, Knowledge, Magic, Rune, Spell, Universal
Favored Weapon: Shuriken (representing spells cast) | Symbol: Seven blue-white stars / blue flame
Worshippers: Wizards, sorcerers, bards, any spellcaster; scholars of the arcane
Clergy: Called the Mystran clergy. Devoted to preserving magical knowledge. Allowed to be any alignment.
Notes: Third to hold the role. First Mystra died before recorded history. Second (Midnight) died 1385 DR
(Spellplague — ignore for 3.5 campaigns). In 1372 DR, Mystra II is alive and maintains the Weave.
Her Chosen include Elminster, the Seven Sisters, Khelben Arunsun.

**Shar** (SHAR)
AL: NE | Portfolio: Dark, night, loss, forgetting, secrets, caverns
Domains: Cavern, Darkness, Evil, Knowledge
Favored Weapon: Chakram | Symbol: Black disk with purple border
Worshippers: Rogues, those with dark secrets, the evil, nihilists, undead worshippers
Clergy: Sharrans operate in secret cells. Clergy called Darkbringers and Nightbringers.
Notes: Twin sister of Selûne; eternal rivals. Created the Shadow Weave as corruption of Mystra's Weave.
Her greatest desire is to undo all creation (which she views as a wound on the original void).
Controls the Plane of Shadow partially. Shade Enclave serves her interests.

**Silvanus** (sil-VAY-nus)
AL: N | Portfolio: Wild nature, druids, the natural world
Domains: Animal, Plant, Protection, Renewal, Water, Weather
Favored Weapon: Maul (greatclub) | Symbol: Green oak leaf
Worshippers: Druids, rangers, woodsmen, hunters, some barbarians
Clergy: Called the Treefather's clergy. Widely dispersed across Faerûn. Oppose civilization's excesses.
Notes: One of the oldest deities. Chauntea's counterpart for wild (not cultivated) nature.

**Talos** (TAY-lohs)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Storms, destruction, rebellion, conflagrations, earthquakes
Domains: Chaos, Destruction, Evil, Fire, Storm
Favored Weapon: Spear | Symbol: Three lightning bolts radiating from a point
Worshippers: Barbarians, sailors (fearfully), evil druids, those who revel in destruction
Clergy: Called Stormherald. Violent, destructive clergy who demand tribute and cause chaos.
Notes: Claims credit for all natural disasters. Among the oldest powers. Known as the Destroyer.

**Tempus** (TEM-pus)
AL: CN | Portfolio: War, battle, warriors, combat, soldiers
Domains: Chaos, Protection, STR, War
Favored Weapon: Battleaxe | Symbol: Flaming sword or white gauntlet
Worshippers: Warriors, soldiers, mercenaries, generals, anyone who fights
Clergy: Called Battleguards. Worship through combat; temples are training grounds. Equal respect for
both sides in a conflict.
Notes: Most widely worshipped of the gods in Faerûn. No alignment requirement for worshippers.
Does not prefer victory over defeat — only that battle be fought with courage. Warrior deity archetype.

**Torm** (TORM)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Duty, loyalty, obedience, paladins
Domains: Good, Healing, Law, Protection, STR
Favored Weapon: Greatsword | Symbol: Armored right gauntlet upraised
Worshippers: Paladins, soldiers, city guards, those who value duty and honor
Clergy: Called Triadic Templars (alongside Ilmater and Tyr). Strict hierarchy, lawful behavior.
Notes: Died during the Time of Troubles (1358 DR) fighting Bane; resurrected by Ao as reward.
The True Deity; patron of paladins.

**Tyr** (TEER)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Justice, law, order, fair combat
Domains: Good, Knowledge, Law, Retribution, War
Favored Weapon: Longsword | Symbol: Balanced scales resting on a warhammer
Worshippers: Judges, paladins, lawyers, magistrates, city watch, anyone who values justice
Clergy: Called Tyrrans. Maintain courts and law. Combat evil with force when necessary.
Notes: The Maimed God. Lost his hand to the wolf Kezef Chaos-Hound as part of a deal. Works closely
with Torm and Ilmater (the Triad). Blind (sacrificed eyes for WIS).

---

### Intermediate Deities

**Azuth** (ah-ZOOTH)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Wizards, mages, spellcasters, monks, scribes
Domains: Illusion, Knowledge, Law, Magic, Spell
Favored Weapon: Quarterstaff | Symbol: Pointing left hand with a shining blue fingertip
Notes: Patron of wizards. Often acts as advisor to Mystra. First Magister.

**Bane** (BANE)
AL: LE | Portfolio: Strife, hatred, tyranny, fear, murder
Domains: Destruction, Evil, Hatred, Law, Tyranny
Favored Weapon: Morningstar | Symbol: Black hand with thumb touching forefinger
Notes: Killed by Torm in the Time of Troubles; returned by 1372 DR through Xvim (his son).
His revival is a major 1372 DR plot point (see FRCS for details). Zhentarim primary patron.

**Beshaba** (beh-SHAH-bah)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Misfortune, random mischief, disasters, accidents
Domains: Chaos, Evil, Fate, Luck, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Scourge | Symbol: Black antlers on white field
Notes: Rival/counterpart of Tymora. Maid of Misfortune. Extremely capricious.

**Deneir** (deh-NEER)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Glyphs, images, literature, scribes, cartographers
Domains: Good, Knowledge, Protection, Rune
Favored Weapon: Dagger | Symbol: Lit candle above a single eye
Notes: Patron of scribes and cartographers. Sometimes considered an aspect of Oghma.

**Eldath** (EL-dath)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Quiet places, springs, pools, peace, waterfalls, stillness
Domains: Family, Good, Plant, Protection, Water
Favored Weapon: Net | Symbol: Waterfall feeding a quiet pool
Notes: Pacifist deity; extremely reclusive.

**Gond** (GOND)
AL: N | Portfolio: Artifice, craft, construction, smithwork
Domains: Craft, Earth, Fire, Knowledge, Metal, Planning
Favored Weapon: Warhammer | Symbol: Toothed cog with four spokes
Notes: Patron of artisans. Gondsman (construct) servants. Temple in Lantan.

**Helm** (HELM)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Guardians, protectors, protection, watchers
Domains: Law, Planning, Protection, STR
Favored Weapon: Bastard sword or greatsword | Symbol: Staring eye on an upright armored gauntlet
Notes: The Vigilant One. Required to guard at all ×; never allowed to break duty. Ancient deity.
Mythal keepers of old were sometimes Helm worshippers. In Cormyr, Helm has many temple-fortresses.

**Ilmater** (ill-MAY-ter)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Endurance, suffering, martyrdom, perseverance, the oppressed
Domains: Good, Healing, Law, STR, Suffering
Favored Weapon: Unarmed strike | Symbol: Pair of hands bound at the wrist with red cord
Notes: The Crying God. Worshippers suffer willingly to ease others' pain. Part of the Triad.
Popular among the poor and suffering. Most popular in the Eastern Heartlands, Calimshan, and Turmish.

**Lathander** (lah-THAN-der)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Beginnings, birth, spring, athletics, vitality, self-perfection, youth
Domains: Good, Healing, Nobility, Protection, Renewal, STR, Sun
Favored Weapon: Heavy or light mace | Symbol: Rosy pink disk
Notes: The Morninglord. Extremely popular; one of the most widely worshipped. Many temples.
Paladins may take Lathander as patron. Strong presence in Waterdeep, Baldur's Gate, Cormyr.

**Malar** (MAY-lar)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Hunters, bloodlust, evil lycanthropes, blood
Domains: Animal, Chaos, Evil, Moon, STR
Favored Weapon: Claw bracer (treat as kama) | Symbol: Bestial claw with blood-red talons
Notes: The Beastlord. Patron of evil hunters and lycanthropes. Rival of Nobanion and Lurue.

**Mask** (MASK)
AL: NE | Portfolio: Thieves, thievery, shadows, intrigue, dungeons
Domains: Darkness, Evil, Luck, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Hand crossbow | Symbol: Black velvet mask tinged with red
Notes: The Lord of Shadows. Patron of thieves. Opposes Waukeen and the merchants of the Sword Coast.
Temple of Mask operatives often serve as information brokers.

**Milil** (MIH-lil)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Poetry, literature, music, bards
Domains: Good, Knowledge, Nobility, Protection
Favored Weapon: Longsword (dueling songs) | Symbol: Five-stringed harp made of leaves
Notes: Patron of bards. Rival of Oghma (friendly). Very popular in Amn and Waterdeep.

**Nobanion** (no-BAN-ee-on)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Royalty, lions, good beasts, felines
Domains: Animal, Good, Law, Nobility
Favored Weapon: Heavy flail | Symbol: Lion's head rearing up facing left
Notes: Outsider power who made Faerûn his home. Popular in the Shaar and among humanoids.

**Oghma** (OG-mah)
AL: N | Portfolio: Knowledge, invention, inspiration, bards, scribes
Domains: Charm, Knowledge, Luck, Travel, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Longsword | Symbol: Blank scroll
Notes: Binder of What Is Known. Very popular across Faerûn. Temples often double as libraries.

**Red Knight** (The)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Strategy, planning, tactics, war
Domains: Law, Nobility, Planning, War
Favored Weapon: Longsword | Symbol: Red knight chess piece with stars for eyes
Notes: Ascended from mortal or created by Tempus (accounts vary). Worship common in military orders.

**Savras** (SAV-ras)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Divination, fate, truth, the future
Domains: Fate, Knowledge, Law, Magic, Spell
Favored Weapon: Dagger or quarterstaff | Symbol: Crystal ball with many eyes inside
Notes: Once imprisoned by Azuth; freed during ToT. Patron of diviners and fortune-tellers.

**Selûne** (seh-LOO-nay)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Moon, stars, navigation, navigators, wanderers
Domains: Chaos, Good, Moon, Protection, Travel
Favored Weapon: Quarterstaff | Symbol: Pair of female eyes surrounded by seven silver stars
Notes: Twin sister and eternal rival of Shar. Associated with lycanthropes (especially good ones).
Moonmaiden; her tears fall as the Tears of Selûne (asteroids trailing the moon). Very popular
among sailors, navigators, and those who travel at night.

**Sune** (SOO-nee)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Beauty, love, passion, romance
Domains: Chaos, Charm, Good, Protection
Favored Weapon: Whip | Symbol: Red-haired woman's face
Notes: Firehair. Rival of Shade and anything ugly. Temples are among the most beautiful in Faerûn.
Extremely popular among elves and nobility.

**Talona** (tah-LOH-nah)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Disease, poison, illness
Domains: Chaos, Destruction, Evil
Favored Weapon: Unarmed strike (claws) | Symbol: Three teardrops on a triangle
Notes: Lady of Poison. Sister / rival of Chauntea. Worshippers often spread plague deliberately.

**Tymora** (tie-MOR-ah)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Good fortune, skill, victory, adventurers
Domains: Chaos, Good, Luck, Protection, Travel
Favored Weapon: Shuriken | Symbol: Silver disk (coin face-up)
Notes: Lady Luck. Most popular deity among adventurers. "Tymora's favor" is a common toast.
She was once an aspect of Tyche (broken into Tymora + Beshaba during ancient ×).

**Umberlee** (UM-ber-lee)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Oceans, currents, waves, sea winds, sailors (as extortion victim)
Domains: Chaos, Destruction, Evil, Ocean, Storm, Water
Favored Weapon: Trident | Symbol: Wave curling left and right
Notes: The Bitch Queen. Sailors pay tribute to her out of fear, not love. Her clergy are extortionists.

**Waukeen** (waw-KEEN)
AL: N | Portfolio: Trade, money, merchants, wealth
Domains: Knowledge, Protection, Travel, Trade
Favored Weapon: Nunchaku | Symbol: Upright coin with Waukeen's profile facing left
Notes: Disappeared during ToT; was trapped in Limbo by Graz'zt for years; finally returned ~1370 DR.
Trade-related temples often double as banks or money-changers.

---

### Lesser Deities

**Finder Wyvernspur** (FINE-der WIH-vern-spur)
AL: CN | Portfolio: Transformation, the cycle of life, redemption
Domains: Chaos, Renewal, Scalykind, Travel
Favored Weapon: Bastard sword

**Garagos** (gah-RAH-gos)
AL: CE | Portfolio: War, skill-at-arms, destruction
Domains: Chaos, Destruction, STR, War
Notes: Older war god deposed by Tempus. Worshipped in Unther (alongside Anhur).

**Gargauth** (GAR-gawth)
AL: LE | Portfolio: Political corruption, cruelty, betrayal, licensed corruption
Domains: Charm, Evil, Law, Trickery
Notes: Fallen god; trapped in a shield for much of history. Has cults in many nations.

**Gwaeron Windstrom**
AL: NG | Portfolio: Tracking, rangers of the North
Domains: Animal, Good, Knowledge, Plant, Travel
Favored Weapon: Greatsword

**Hoar** (HOR)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Revenge, retribution, poetic justice
Domains: Fate, Law, Travel
Notes: Old Untheric deity.

**Jergal** (JER-gal)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Fatalism, proper burial, guardianship of tombs
Domains: Death, Fate, Law, Repose, Suffering
Notes: Very ancient; gave most portfolio to Bane/Bhaal/Myrkul in an ancient chess game.

**Lliira** (LEER-ah)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Joy, happiness, dance, festivals, freedom
Domains: Chaos, Charm, Family, Good
Favored Weapon: Shuriken (thrown)

**Loviatar** (LOV-ee-ah-tar)
AL: LE | Portfolio: Pain, hurt, agony, torment, suffering, torture
Domains: Evil, Law, Retribution, STR, Suffering
Notes: The Maiden of Pain. Rival of Ilmater. Worshippers in gladiatorial arenas.

**Lurue** (loo-ROO-ay)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Unicorns, talking beasts, intelligent non-humanoid creatures
Domains: Animal, Chaos, Good, Healing

**Mielikki** (my-EE-lik-ee)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Autumn, dryads, forests, forest creatures, rangers
Domains: Animal, Good, Plant, Travel
Favored Weapon: Scimitar
Notes: Patron of rangers in the North. Mate of Gwaeron Windstrom. Revered in the Silver Marches.

**Milil** — see Intermediate above

**Mystra** — see Greater above

**Sharess** (shah-RESS)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Hedonism, festhalls, physical pleasure, cats, sensual fulfillment
Domains: Chaos, Charm, Good, Travel, Trickery

**Shaundakul** (SHAWN-dah-kul)
AL: CN | Portfolio: Travel, exploration, caravans, portals, seekers
Domains: Air, Chaos, Portal, Protection, Trade, Travel
Notes: Ancient portal deity; worshipped by merchants and explorers. Old Netherese deity.

**Shiallia** (shee-AL-ee-ah)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Woodland glades, woodland fertility, the High Forest
Domains: Animal, Good, Plant, Renewal

**Siamorphe** (SEE-ah-morf)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Nobles, rightful rule, aristocracy
Domains: Knowledge, Law, Nobility, Planning

**Ulutiu** (oo-LOO-tee-oo)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Glaciers, polar environments, arctic dwellers
Domains: Animal, Law, Ocean, Protection, Weather
Notes: Asleep beneath the Sea of Moving Ice; sustains the Great Glacier.

**Urogalan** (oo-ROH-gah-lan)
AL: LN | Portfolio: Earth, death, protection of the dead (halfling deity)
Domains: Death, Earth, Law, Protection

**Valkur** (VAL-kur)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Sailors, ships, favorable winds, naval combat
Domains: Air, Chaos, Good, Ocean, Protection
Notes: Ascended mortal. Popular among Waterdavian sailors.

**Velsharoon** (VEL-sha-roon)
AL: NE | Portfolio: Necromancy, liches, undeath, immortality through undeath
Domains: Death, Evil, Magic, Undeath
Notes: Ascended mortal (mage). Arcane Lich patron. Rival of Kelemvor.

---

### Dead Powers (Relevant to 1372 DR)

**Bhaal** (BALE) — God of murder. Killed during ToT. His essence fragmented into Bhaalspawn.
**Myrkul** — God of death (pre-Kelemvor). Destroyed during ToT by Midnight.
**Bane** — Killed during ToT; revived via Xvim by 1372 DR (plot hook).
**Moander** — God of corruption. Slain; essence imprisoned in a monolith.
**Iyachtu Xvim** — Bhaal's son, Bane's heir; consumed when Bane returned (1372 DR).

---

## Drow Pantheon

**Lolth** (LOLTH) — Greater Deity
AL: CE | Portfolio: Spiders, evil, darkness, chaos, assassins, drow (especially females)
Domains: Chaos, Darkness, Destruction, Evil, Drow, Spider, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Dagger | Symbol: Black spider with female drow head hanging from a web
Notes: The Spider Queen. Absolute ruler of drow society. Demands chaotic subservience — an
inherent contradiction she enforces through terror. Worshipped in Menzoberranzan, Eryndlyn, and
every drow city. Priestesses are the ruling class. During the Time of Troubles, she "went silent"
for a period that nearly destroyed drow society (see War of the Spider Queen series).

**Eilistraee** (eel-ISS-tray-ee)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Good drow, song, beauty, dance, swordwork, moonlight, hunting
Domains: Chaos, Charm, Good, Moon, Portal
Favored Weapon: Bastard sword (moonblade) | Symbol: Unclad dancing drow woman with long hair
Notes: Daughter of Corellon and Araushnee (who became Lolth). Only good drow deity. Worshipped
by surface drow and those who seek redemption. Temples are moonlit clearings.

**Ghaunadaur** (gaw-NAW-dawr)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Oozes, slimes, jellies, outcasts, ropers, rebels
Domains: Cavern, Chaos, Drow, Evil
Notes: Ancient aberrant power. Worshipped by the most wretched drow outcasts and aboleth-kin.

**Kiaransalee** (kee-ah-RAN-sah-lee)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Drow, vengeance, undeath (especially drow undead)
Domains: Chaos, Drow, Evil, Undeath
Favored Weapon: Dagger
Notes: Once a drow queen who was killed and made undead. She slew Orcus briefly.

**Selvetarm** (SEL-veh-tarm)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Drow warriors, the combination of spider and sword
Domains: Chaos, Drow, Evil, Spider, War
Notes: Champion of Lolth. A spider-demon corrupted into service.

**Vhaeraun** (vay-RAWN)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Thievery, drow males, territory, evil activities on the surface
Domains: Chaos, Drow, Evil, Travel, Trickery
Favored Weapon: Short sword (pair) | Symbol: Black half-mask with eye holes
Notes: Son of Corellon and Araushnee. In eternal conflict with Eilistraee and Lolth. Patron of
male drow surface-dwellers and the Jaezred Chaulssin.

---

## Elven Pantheon (The Seldarine)

**Corellon Larethian** (core-ELL-on lah-RETH-ee-an) — Greater Deity
AL: CG | Portfolio: Magic, music, arts, crafts, poetry, war, elves, eladrin, creators
Domains: Chaos, Good, Magic, Protection, War
Favored Weapon: Longsword | Symbol: Crescent moon
Notes: Creator of the elven race. Father of the Seldarine (mostly). Fought Gruumsh at creation —
Gruumsh lost an eye. Core elf deity. His blood fell to Toril and became the first elves.

**Angharradh** (ANG-hah-radh)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Spring, fertility, planting, birth, defense, WIS
Domains: Chaos, Good, Knowledge, Plant, Protection, Renewal
Notes: Triune goddess composed of Aerdrie Faenya, Hanali Celanil, and Sehanine Moonbow.
Consort of Corellon. Primary female elf deity.

**Aerdrie Faenya** (AYR-dree FAY-nee-ah)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Air, wind, freedom, clouds, weather, birds, avariel
Domains: Air, Animal, Chaos, Good, Storm
Favored Weapon: Quarterstaff

**Deep Sashelas** (deep SASH-eh-lahs)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Oceans, aquatic elves, creation, knowledge, dolphins
Domains: Chaos, Good, Knowledge, Ocean, Water

**Erevan Ilesere** (EHR-eh-van ih-LEH-sehr)
AL: CN | Portfolio: Mischief, change, rogues, changeability
Domains: Chaos, Luck, Trickery

**Fenmarel Mestarine** (FEN-mah-rel MEH-stah-reen)
AL: CN | Portfolio: Feral elves, outcasts, scapegoats, isolation
Domains: Animal, Chaos, Plant, Travel

**Hanali Celanil** (HAN-ah-lee SEL-ah-nill)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Love, romance, beauty, fine art, artists
Domains: Chaos, Charm, Good, Magic, Protection

**Labelas Enoreth** (LAH-beh-lahs EHN-oh-reth)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Time, longevity, the moment of choice, history, philosophy
Domains: Chaos, Good, Knowledge, Time

**Rillifane Rallathil** (RIL-ih-fayn RAL-ah-thil)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Woodlands, nature, wild elves, druids
Domains: Chaos, Good, Plant, Protection

**Sehanine Moonbow** (SEH-hah-neen)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Mysticism, dreams, death, journeys, transcendence, moon elves
Domains: Chaos, Good, Illusion, Knowledge, Moon, Travel

**Shevarash** (SHEV-ah-rash)
AL: CN | Portfolio: Hatred of the drow, vengeance, grief, loss
Domains: Chaos, Retribution, War
Notes: Mortal elven archer who ascended. Dedicated solely to destroying drow.

**Solonor Thelandira** (SOL-oh-nor theh-LAN-dee-rah)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Archery, hunting, wilderness survival
Domains: Chaos, Good, Plant, War

---

## Dwarven Pantheon (The Morndinsamman)

**Moradin** (MOR-ah-din) — Greater Deity
AL: LG | Portfolio: Dwarves, creation, smithing, engineering, war, earth
Domains: Dwarf, Earth, Good, Law, Protection
Favored Weapon: Warhammer | Symbol: A hammer and anvil
Notes: Soul Forger. Creator of the dwarven race. Chief of dwarven pantheon.

**Berronar Truesilver** (beh-ROH-nar TROO-sil-ver)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Safety, home, dwarven life, healing, females, the hearth
Domains: Dwarf, Good, Healing, Law, Protection
Consort of Moradin.

**Clangeddin Silverbeard** (KLAN-geh-din)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Battle, war, valor, bravery, honor in battle
Domains: Dwarf, Good, Law, STR, War
Favored Weapon: Battleaxe (paired)

**Dugmaren Brightmantle** (DUG-mah-ren)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Scholarship, invention, discovery, the wandering mind
Domains: Chaos, Dwarf, Good, Knowledge

**Dumathoin** (doo-MAH-tho-in)
AL: N | Portfolio: Mining, underground exploration, gems, secrets of the earth
Domains: Cavern, Dwarf, Earth, Knowledge, Metal, Protection

**Gorm Gulthyn** (GORM GUL-thin)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Defense, watchfulness, guardian of the dwarves
Domains: Dwarf, Good, Law, Protection, War

**Haela Brightaxe** (HAY-lah)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Luck in battle, joy of battle, dwarven fighters
Domains: Chaos, Dwarf, Good, Luck, War

**Marthammor Duin** (MAR-tham-or DWIN)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Guides, pathfinders, dwarven wanderers, lightning, speed
Domains: Dwarf, Good, Protection, Travel

**Thard Harr** (THARD HAR)
AL: CG | Portfolio: Dwarves in the jungles of Chult, wild dwarves, hunting
Domains: Animal, Chaos, Dwarf, Good, Plant

**Vergadain** (VER-gah-dain)
AL: N | Portfolio: Wealth, luck, chance, merchant dwarves, thieves
Domains: Dwarf, Luck, Trade, Trickery

---

## Gnomish Pantheon (Lords of the Golden Hills)

**Garl Glittergold** (GARL) — Greater Deity
AL: LG | Portfolio: Gnomes, protection, humor, trickery, gemcutting, jewelers
Domains: Good, Law, Protection, Trickery
Symbol: Gold nugget

**Baravar Cloakshadow** (BAR-ah-var)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Illusions, deception, traps, wards
Domains: Good, Illusion, Protection, Trickery

**Callarduran Smoothhands** (kah-LAR-dyoor-an)
AL: N | Portfolio: Stone, the Underdark, mining, svirfneblin (deep gnomes)
Domains: Cavern, Earth, Knowledge

**Flandal Steelskin** (FLAN-dal)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Mining, physical improvement, metalwork
Domains: Craft, Earth, Fire, Good, Metal

**Gaerdal Ironhand** (GAYR-dal)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Defense, vigilance, combat
Domains: Good, Law, Protection, War

**Segojan Earthcaller** (SEH-go-jan)
AL: NG | Portfolio: Earth, nature, burrows, healing
Domains: Animal, Earth, Good, Plant

**Urdlen** (URD-len)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Greed, bloodlust, evil, hatred (rogue gnome deity)
Domains: Chaos, Earth, Evil
Notes: The Crawler Below; a blind, albino mole-creature. Chaos amid the gnomish pantheon.

---

## Halfling Pantheon (Yondalla's Children)

**Yondalla** (yon-DAH-lah) — Greater Deity
AL: LG | Portfolio: Halflings, protection, fertility, half-elves, children, security
Domains: Family, Good, Halfling, Law, Protection
Favored Weapon: Short sword

**Arvoreen** (ar-voh-REEN)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Defense, vigilance, war, halfling fighters
Domains: Good, Halfling, Law, Protection, War

**Brandobaris** (BRAN-doh-bar-iss)
AL: N | Portfolio: Stealth, thievery, adventuring, halfling rogues
Domains: Halfling, Luck, Travel, Trickery

**Cyrrollalee** (seer-oh-LAH-lee)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Friendship, trust, the hearth, home, halfling hospitality
Domains: Family, Good, Halfling, Law

**Sheela Peryroyl** (SHEE-lah PEHR-ee-royl)
AL: N | Portfolio: Nature, weather, farming, dancing, song
Domains: Air, Charm, Halfling, Plant

**Urogalan** — see Faerûnian pantheon above

---

## Orcish Pantheon

**Gruumsh** (GROOMSH) — Greater Deity
AL: CE | Portfolio: Orcs, conquest, survival, STR, territory
Domains: Cavern, Chaos, Evil, Orc, STR, War
Symbol: Unblinking eye (lost to Corellon)
Notes: The One-Eyed God. Lost an eye (accounts vary: to Corellon or to a rival). Commands orcs
to expand and destroy.

**Bahgtru** (BAH-groo)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Loyalty, stupidity, brute STR
Domains: Chaos, Evil, Orc, STR

**Ilneval** (IL-neh-val)
AL: NE | Portfolio: War, strategy, hordes, overwhelming numbers
Domains: Evil, Law, Orc, Planning, War

**Luthic** (LOO-thik)
AL: LE | Portfolio: Caves, female orcs, home, fertility, healing
Domains: Cavern, Earth, Evil, Orc

**Shargaas** (SHAR-gaas)
AL: CE | Portfolio: Night, thieves, the undead, darness
Domains: Chaos, Evil, Orc, Trickery

**Yurtrus** (YOOR-trus)
AL: NE | Portfolio: Death, disease, undeath
Domains: Death, Evil, Orc

---

## Giant Pantheon (The Ordning)

**Annam All-Father** — Greater Deity
AL: N | Portfolio: Giants, history, creation, learning, philosophy
Notes: Withdrawn from the world after the fall of the giant empires.

**Diancastra** | **Grolantor** | **Hiatea** | **Iallanis** | **Karontor** | **Memnor** | **Skoraeus Stonebones** | **Stronmaus** | **Surtr** | **Thrym**

Full coverage in FR Wiki: forgottenrealms.fandom.com/wiki/Giant_pantheon

---

## Dragon Pantheon

**Io** (EE-oh) — Overgod of Dragonkind. Neutral. Created both Bahamut and Tiamat.

**Bahamut** (bah-HAH-mut)
AL: LG | Portfolio: Good dragons, WIS, justice, wind
Domains: Air, Good, Law, Luck, Protection
Notes: Platinum Dragon. Five great wyrm gold dragons serve as advisors. Takes humanoid form often.

**Tiamat** (TEE-ah-mat)
AL: LE | Portfolio: Evil dragons, greed, wealth, queen of evil dragonkind
Domains: Evil, Law, Scalykind, Tyranny
Notes: Five-headed (chromatic). Imprisoned in Avernus (first layer of Baator). Has cult in Faerûn.

Other dragon deities: **Aasterinian** (invention, pleasure, WN), **Chronepsis** (fate, death, N),
**Faluzure** (undeath, shadow dragons, NE), **Garyx** (fire, destruction, CE),
**Hlal** (humor, tricks, CG), **Lendys** (justice, law, LN), **Tamara** (life, light, NG)

---

## Notes on Domain Assignment (3.5)

Domains grant 1 spell per SL AND 1 granted power. Clerics get 2 domains.

**Uncommon domains** (non-SRD, from FR sources):
Cavern (Stoneshape 1/day / Darkvision), Craft (Repair damage), Drow (Clairaudience/Clairvoyance 1/day),
Dwarf (+4 Dodge vs. giants), Fate (Uncanny Dodge), Halfling (+1 attack 1/day), Metal (Rust resistance),
Moon (Turn lycanthropes), Nobility (Leadership bon feat), Ocean (Water breathing 1/day),
Orc (Blind-fight bon feat), Planning (Extend Spell metamagic free 1/day), Portal (Dimension door 1/day),
Renewal (Reborn on death once/day), Retribution (Smite 1/day), Scalykind (+2 save vs. reptile),
Spell (Imbue with Spell Ability 1/day), Spider (Poison 1/day), Suffering (Pain touch 1/day),
Time (Haste 1/day), Trade (1/day +4 Appraise/Bluff/Diplomacy/Forgery), Tyranny (Domination),
Undeath (Rebuke/control undead), War (free Martial Weapon Proficiency + Weapon Focus for deity's weapon)
